content:
**Lean Settings For Vibrancy**
```jsonc
{
"workbench.colorTheme": "Default Dark+",
"workbench.editor.pinnedTabsOnSeparateRow": true,
"window.autoDetectColorScheme": true,
"workbench.colorCustomizations": {
"activityBar.activeBorder": "#6fb9ff",
"activityBarBadge.background": "#6fb9ff",
"tab.activeBorderTop": "#6fb9ff"
},
"vscode_vibrancy.enableAutoTheme": true,
"vscode_vibrancy.type": "under-window",
"vscode_vibrancy.forceFramelessWindow": false, // set false first for stability
"vscode_vibrancy.opacity": 0.85, // -1 = extension default; choose explicit value
"vscode_vibrancy.refreshInterval": 0, // 0 disables periodic refresh loops
"editor.cursorSmoothCaretAnimation": "on",
"editor.inlayHints.padding": true,
"files.autoSave": "onFocusChange",
